lts.competency_name: Marriage, Civil Partnership, and Family Structures
lts.lt_definition: I can explain the legal differences between marriage, civil partnership, and cohabitation including their respective rights and protections.

lts.competency_name: Marriage, Civil Partnership, and Family Structures
lts.lt_definition: I can describe how families change over time and identify characteristics of successful parenting including early childhood development.
I can explain the role of consent, trust, respect, and ethical behaviour in maintaining healthy romantic relationships.
I can judge when a relationship is unsafe and identify appropriate sources of help.
I can explain the legal rights and responsibilities regarding equality and the importance of self-esteem in healthy relationships.
I can apply communication strategies that demonstrate respect in relationships and conflict situations.
The student consistently treats others with kindness and respect while developing personal interests and independence.
I can identify different types of bullying, explain their impact, and describe how to get help.
I can apply skills to end relationships kindly and manage difficult feelings.
The student enacts responsibility to report bullying when witnessed.
I can explain how stereotypes and power inequalities damage relationships and normalise harmful behaviours.
I can identify prejudice and analyse how subcultures and media influence sexual attitudes and behaviours.
I can identify appropriate privacy settings and explain when personal information should not be shared online.
I can identify potential fake accounts and explain how social media content may be misleading or exaggerated.
I can explain how behavioural expectations apply consistently across online and offline contexts.

lts.lt_name: Understanding Legal Risks of Image Sharing
lts.lt_definition: I can explain the legal consequences and serious risks of sharing intimate images online.

lts.lt_definition: I can determine appropriate actions and reporting procedures when concerned about circulated material.

lts.competency_name: Deepfakes, Harmful Content, and Online Harms
lts.lt_definition: I can identify deepfakes and recognise various forms of harmful online content including illegal material and distorted representations.

lts.competency_name: Deepfakes, Harmful Content, and Online Harms
lts.lt_definition: I can explain how deepfakes and online content can be misused maliciously and the various harms they can cause to individuals and society.

lts.competency_name: Deepfakes, Harmful Content, and Online Harms
lts.lt_definition: I can identify appropriate sources of advice and support when encountering concerning online content or experiences.

lts.lt_definition: I can identify online scams, data sharing practices, and emerging technology risks.

lts.competency_name: Consent, Boundaries, and Pressure in Relationships
lts.lt_definition: I can recognise, respect and communicate consent and boundaries in relationships including romantic and sexual contexts.

lts.competency_name: Consent, Boundaries, and Pressure in Relationships
lts.lt_definition: I can identify and resist pressure from others while avoiding putting pressure on others in relationships.

lts.competency_name: Consent, Boundaries, and Pressure in Relationships
lts.lt_definition: I can explain that kindness and care for others requires more than just consent.

lts.competency_name: Personal Safety and Recognising Unsafe Relationships
lts.lt_definition: I can evaluate whether people and relationships are trustworthy and safe using appropriate reasoning strategies.

lts.competency_name: Personal Safety and Recognising Unsafe Relationships
lts.lt_definition: I can identify appropriate ways to seek help and report concerns about harmful behaviour when needed.

lts.competency_name: Personal Safety and Recognising Unsafe Relationships
lts.lt_definition: The student trusts their instincts and responds appropriately when something doesn't feel right.
I can identify and describe different forms of sexual harassment, sexual violence, and exploitative behaviors including their legal definitions.

lts.lt_definition: I can explain domestic abuse concepts, relevant legislation including the Domestic Abuse Act 2021, and the impact on victims including children.
